items.title: Schedule follow-up call with Boris (Blast Security) about their fundraising round
items.context: Email from borisv@blast.security on Jun 4: Boris responded to Richie's outreach about the round, saying 'I would love to catch up either Friday or Monday morning. Please let me know which day works better.' Richie had asked to discuss the round Blast is putting together after being impressed by the demo.

items.title: Follow up with Barak on Opti round details after board meeting
items.context: Email thread Jun 3-8: Barak (CEO) had board meeting Jun 4 and said he'd have 'concrete updates by early next week.' Round discussed at ~$15-20M at $75-90M pre-money. Richie confirmed ~$2mm check interest on Jun 8 and offered to hop on the phone. No response from Barak visible yet.

items.title: Prep for SMBC Cyber Security Trend meeting at SF office
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC <> Fin Capital Meeting for Cyber Security Trend' on Jun 15 at 1 Sansome St SF with attendees from SMBC (Yuji Ogata, Dawn Berry) and JRI America (Yuko Tazuki). Full investment team invited.

errors: Aembit: email body too large to parse for to-do extraction (101K chars of HTML content)
